response.justification: The candidate meets the raw experience bar (~19 years spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems) and shows genuine engineering craftsmanship, open-source authorship, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks). However, this is a director-level individual-contributor role centered on AI strategy, and the resume demonstrates neither recognized AI/ML expertise, shipped AI-powered products or platforms, nor org-level technical leadership. The career trajectory is solid senior/staff-level product engineering, not strategic advisory or engineering leadership at the scope this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad, hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Founder-level initiative: long-running open-source geo-data platform plus multiple published libraries and tools
Recent practical experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generation, agentic workflow tooling)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth or recognized AI expertise; AI-related work is limited to roughly one year of tooling
No evidence of director-level scope: no track record of setting technical strategy, advising executives/customers, or leading through influence at scale
No cloud platform strategy experience; cloud usage appears limited to application-level AWS/Kubernetes work

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Deep, versatile hands-on engineering experience exceeding the 15-year bar
